summary: Iteration 24 testing complete. All new match-based player stats features verified working: 1) Backend POST /api/admin/fixtures/{id}/player-stats saves player performances and increments aggregate stats. 2) Backend GET /api/admin/fixtures/{id}/player-stats retrieves saved performances. 3) Idempotency verified - re-saving stats reverses old stats before applying new. 4) Admin academy schedule shows green check button for Scheduled fixtures to open MatchStatsModal. 5) Admin academy schedule shows bar chart icon for Completed fixtures to re-edit stats. 6) MatchStatsModal displays score inputs, player list with checkboxes, stats fields (minutes, goals, assists, yellow/red cards). 7) 'Όλοι συμμετείχαν' button selects all players and sets 90 minutes. 8) Public /academy/:groupId Στατιστικά tab shows computed W/D/L, goals, top scorers from player stats.
seed_data_creation: Used existing U12 academy group (id: 7dda3b6a-afc6-48d2-9f64-8907533c2f34) with 4 players and 1 completed fixture (3-1 vs Aris Academy U12). Created and cleaned up test fixtures during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 tested match-based player stats input feature. Key components: 1) Backend endpoints at /api/admin/fixtures/{id}/player-stats (GET/POST) with idempotent stat reversal logic (lines 974-1035 in server.py). 2) MatchStatsModal component in AdminPanel.jsx (lines 286-460) with data-testids: match-stats-modal, home-score-input, away-score-input, select-all-players, player-stat-row-{id}, save-match-stats, cancel-match-stats. 3) Fixture action buttons: complete-fixture-{id} (green check for Scheduled), edit-stats-{id} (bar chart for Completed). 4) Public stats tab in AcademyGroupPage.jsx computes W/D/L from fixtures and shows player leaders from statistics field. Test data: U12 group has 4 players with stats from 1 completed match (3-1 win).

backend_player_stats_endpoints.GET_player_stats: PASS - Returns empty for non-existent, returns saved performances for existing
backend_player_stats_endpoints.POST_player_stats: PASS - Saves performances and increments player aggregate stats
backend_player_stats_endpoints.idempotency: PASS - Re-saving reverses old stats before applying new (tested with 3 goals -> 1 goal)
backend_player_stats_endpoints.auth_required: PASS - Both endpoints return 401 without authentication
backend_player_stats_endpoints.404_for_nonexistent: PASS - POST returns 404 for non-existent fixture

admin_fixture_management.scheduled_fixture_complete_button: PASS - Green check icon visible, opens MatchStatsModal
admin_fixture_management.completed_fixture_edit_stats_button: PASS - Bar chart icon visible, opens MatchStatsModal

match_stats_modal.score_inputs: PASS - Home/away score inputs with correct values
match_stats_modal.player_list: PASS - Shows all group players with checkboxes
match_stats_modal.stats_fields: PASS - Minutes, goals, assists, yellow/red card fields
match_stats_modal.all_appeared_button: PASS - Selects all players and sets 90 minutes

public_stats_tab.season_stats_cards: PASS - Shows Αγώνες(1), Νίκες(1), Ισοπαλίες(0), Ήττες(0), Βαθμοί(3)
public_stats_tab.goals_summary: PASS - Shows 3 ΥΠΕΡ, 1 ΚΑΤΑ, +2 ΔΙΑΦΟΡΑ, M.O. 3.0
public_stats_tab.top_scorers: PASS - Shows 2 scorers from player stats
public_stats_tab.top_assisters: PASS - Shows 2 assisters from player stats
